name: 23"x17" Assembled Resin Table Lamp Tan - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Add a comforting glow to any space with the Assembled Resin Table Lamp from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. This stylish tabletop lamp features a layered resin design in a wide round shape to create a rustic yet comforting display in any room. A golden neck and white lampshade add to a versatile design that will look wonderful with most decor schemes. It works with most standard lightbulbs and has a five-foot cord that you can simply plug into the wall. Whether you’re brightening up your reading nook or adding some fresh light to your living room, this tan resin lamp is sure to provide the warm light you desire.

Meet Shea McGee, the designer and stylist behind the brand Studio McGee. Founded alongside her husband, Syd, the studio is known for Shea’s design of beautifully elevated spaces that encourage clients to surround themselves with the things and people they love. Now she’s partnering with Threshold to offer Studio McGee’s classic design in a new collection for inspired homes, everywhere.
